title: Glutamate measurement
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2blqo","text":"Glutamate is enzymatically measured in the cerebrospinal fluid by monitoring the fluorescence increase due to NADPH+ production in the presence of glutamate dehydrogenase and NADP+ on a spectrofluorimeter (Shimadzu RF-5301PC, Japan).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":115,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":179,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
